summary: Breakdown now lets you browse indexed files by storage category and file extension, with search, sort, and CSV export.
introduced: File type filters — tap a storage category in Breakdown to see extension chips (e.g. .mp4, .pdf) with size and file count; tap a chip to filter the list
File list tools — searchable scrollable file list with sort by size, name, modified date, or path
CSV export — copy or save the filtered file list from Breakdown (up to 50,000 files per category or extension)
changed: Breakdown category drill-down — replaces the 12-file preview with a full browseable list grouped by extension
